ns0:entry.ns0:title: Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy
Language: rust
⚡ Python-free Rust inference server — OpenAI-API compatible. GGUF + SafeTensors, hot model swap, auto-discovery, single binary. FREE now, FREE forever.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Stremio/stremio-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Stremio/stremio-core
Language: rust
⚛️ The Stremio Core: types, addon system, UI models, core logic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ai-dynamo/dynamo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ai-dynamo/dynamo
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ast-grep/ast-grep
Language: rust
⚡A CLI tool for code structural search, lint and rewriting. Written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bevyengine/bevy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bevyengine/bevy
Language: rust
A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dani-garcia/vaultwarden
Language: rust
Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: domcyrus/rustnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/domcyrus/rustnet
Language: rust
Per-process network monitoring for your terminal with deep packet inspection. Cross-platform, sandboxed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/pyrefly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/pyrefly
Language: rust
A fast type checker and language server for Python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/pdf-inspector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/pdf-inspector
Language: rust
Fast Rust library for PDF inspection, classification, and text extraction. Intelligently detects scanned vs text-based PDFs to enable smart routing decisions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grpc/grpc-rust
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grpc/grpc-rust
Language: rust
A native gRPC client & server implementation with async/await support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lance-format/lance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lance-format/lance
Language: rust
Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lapce/lapce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lapce/lapce
Language: rust
Lightning-fast and Powerful Code Editor written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
Language: rust
Production-grade Rust-native trading engine with deterministic event-driven architecture

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: screenpipe/screenpipe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/screenpipe/screenpipe
Language: rust
YC (S26) | Give AI the ability to live your experience. Records everything you do, say, hear 24/7, local, private, secure

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tinyhumansai/openhuman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yvgude/lean-ctx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yvgude/lean-ctx
Language: rust
Lean Cortex -- the cognitive context layer for agentic systems. 51+ MCP tools, 10 read modes, 95+ shell patterns. Up to 99% token savings. Works with Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, Windsurf, Codex, Gemini.
